productDisplayName: Puma Men Yacht Battleship Brown Casual Shoes
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Yatch Battleship lifestyle shoes from puma. This brown and blue combo is a fresh take on the classic design and looks cool on the yatch and off it.UpperSuede upper for comfort and protection Stitch detailing in the form of formstripes on the sides Contrast lace-ups for snug FitLeather lining for greater comfort cat logo on the tongueMidsoleCushioned insole for all day comfort Phylon midsole for comfort and stabilityOutsoleRubber non-marking outsole with thin horizontal grooves Scooped heel and flex groove on forefoot with ventilation holes for maximum cushioned comfort
